description: Prepare a surgical planning package in InVesalius 3 using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan. Create a bone segmentation mask and a 3D surface reconstruction. Export the 3D surface as a Wavefront OBJ file to /home/ga/Documents/skull_surface.obj and save a screenshot of the view to /home/ga/Documents/surgical_view.png. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
